title: Models, Interactions API, Capabilities, Stability, and Provider Ports · Language Clinic: Model Capability Discovery
summary: The code hard-codes a preview model, assumes every endpoint supports tools and schemas, mixes legacy generateContent examples with Interactions state, and has no migration seam. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the model capability discovery increment in verified model capability and provider-adapter record. Learners progress through…
objectives: Discover and record model support for interactions, function calls, structured output, multimodal parts, thinking, streaming, context, and limits.
Use the Gemini Interactions API for new agent work and document when a legacy generateContent integration must remain during migration.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.text: A worked example agent engineering team handles case 7381 during a multilingual case-routing evaluation. A defensible solution applies Model Capability Discovery, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to verified model capability and provider-adapter record.

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-model-capability-discovery — Discover and record model support for interactions, function calls, structured output, multimodal parts, thinking, streaming, context, and limits.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-model-api-capabilities-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-model-api-capabilities-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_model_api_capabilities_3(required_capabilities: int = 7, verified_capabilities: int = 7, stable_features: int = 5, preview_features: int = 2, undocumented_assumptions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if required_capabilities < 1 or verified_capabilities < 0:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-shape"
    if verified_capabilities != required_capabilities:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-gap"
    if stable_features < 1 or preview_features < 0:
        return False, stable_features, "stability-boundary"
    if undocumented_assumptions > 0:
        return False, undocumented_assumptions, "undocumented-assumption"
    assert verified_capabilities == required_capabilities and undocumented_assumptions == 0
    return True, verified_capabilities, "verified-model-surface"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic fixed-fixture pure-Python agent decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected model, interaction, schema, tool, authority, state, approval, memory, evaluation, security, telemetry, sandbox, deployment, or recovery case, then state which provider, Gemini, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, identity, storage, browser, accessibility, privacy, load, cost, or production claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.

steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-model-capability-discovery-1ybzxf" that uses case 5617 to select model, endpoint, API version, and provider adapter from verified capabilities and explicit stability boundaries. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-model-capability-discovery-1ybzxf
# Competency: agentpy-model-capability-discovery.
# Case 5617: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_model_capability_discovery_1ybzxf(required_capabilities: int = 7, verified_capabilities: int = 7, stable_features: int = 5, preview_features: int = 2, undocumented_assumptions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1ybzxf = "1ybzxf-fxzby1-5617"
    assert evidence_variant_1ybzxf
    evidence_axes_1ybzxf = (
        "authority1ybzxf",
        "interaction5617",
        "toolfxzby1",
        "state1ybzxf5617",
        "evaluation56171ybzxf",
        "recoveryfxzby15617",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1ybzxf)) == 6
    if required_capabilities < 1 or verified_capabilities < 0:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-shape"
    if verified_capabilities != required_capabilities:
        return False, verified_capabilities, "capability-gap"
    if stable_features < 1 or preview_features < 0:
        return False, stable_features, "stability-boundary"
    if undocumented_assumptions > 0:
        return False, undocumented_assumptions, "undocumented-assumption"
    assert verified_capabilities == required_capabilities and undocumented_assumptions == 0
    return True, verified_capabilities, "verified-model-surface"
